description: Renovate configuration for ShiftPay. Conservative by design — every PR requires a human review before merge. Auto-merge is NOT enabled and is the #1 supply-chain attack vector per the Pass 3 security research.

packageRules.description: Expo SDK and core React Native are pinned together — only Stian decides when to bump these
TypeScript stays within current major; wider bumps land with a dedicated PR
Dev-only deps get grouped to keep PR volume manageable
Bundle the @expo-google-fonts-* packages since they version together
